Date News
2026-07-12 18:55 Documentation The Principles of LSS published

The first public document in the new Lunar Scripts System documentation area has been published.
2026-07-12 18:50 Development LLVM toolchain updated to 22.1.8

The Lunar Linux LLVM toolchain has been updated to version 22.1.8.
2026-07-09 17:50 Project Website 3.1 released

The Lunar Linux Website 3.1 has been published for community evaluation.
2026-06-20 22:00 Project Website 3.0 released

The Lunar Linux Website 3.0 has been published for community evaluation.
2026-06-18 21:30 Project Website 2.8 released

The Lunar Linux Website 2.8 has been published for community evaluation.
2026-06-06 20:15 Community Initial community feedback received

Initial community feedback has been received after the Website 2.0 preview was announced.
2026-06-06 19:30 Project Website 2.0 released

The Lunar Linux Website 2.0 has been published for community evaluation.
2026-06-04 Website Download page refreshed

The Lunar Linux download page has been refreshed with a clearer daily build section, quick notes and direct links to the ISO, IRC and the installation guide.
